title: Enhanced Craft
description:
Enhanced Craft - QOL Done right!
This Fork of Fabulously Optimized aims to provide the best Minecraft Experience without altering the Game Mechanics.
Enhanced Craft is made to be played on Singleplayer or Vanilla Survival Servers.
body:
# **ENHANCED CRAFT**

***Fork of Fabulously Optimized***

---





![Banner for the Modpack EnhancedCraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KZPgLKPo/images/6471f46d8dbf0a5c1353cd6c048b18a84813bc9e.png)






#### ***Enhanced Craft*** Aims to provide the best Minecraft Vanilla + Survival Experience known to man! 
#### With hundreds of QOL features, unbelivable performance and nearly unlimited customizability. 





##### FEATURES


1. Great Performance (Thanks to Sodium and others)
2. Shader Support (Thanks to Iris)
3. Optifine Resource Pack support.
4. QOL Features such as:
   1. Inventory Sorter
   2. In Game Auth
   3. Searchable Containers
   4. Shulker Previews
   5. MiniMap and Worldmap
   6. Replanting Crops Automaticly
   7. A more detailed Armorbar
   8. Just Enough Items
   9. Librarian Trade Finder
   10. And many many more!!!
5. Better and more rich sounds
6. Free Cosmetics
7. Dont wait for things to load (thanks to https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls )
8. And just so much more!


Just Check it out and you will never want to play minecraft any other way.



Be sure to check out the original modpack : [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com 'Fabulously Optimized')
